document-title: Andrés Londoño — Full Stack Developer & Security
cv-email-subject: I'm interested in your profile — Résumé request
cv-email-body:
Hi Andrés,

I came across your portfolio and I'm really interested in your profile. Could you share your résumé with me?

Thank you!
intro-codeline: const andres = developer({ fullstack: true, security: true })
intro-tagline: Systems Engineer focused on scalable, secure and high-performance solutions with .NET, React, the cloud and AI.
intro-message: Always code as if the guy who ends up maintaining your code will be a violent psychopath who knows where you live
about-me-desc-1: Graduate of Systems and Computer Engineering from Universidad Pontificia Bolivariana, Bucaramanga / Santander / Colombia. I am a self-taught individual, passionate about learning new things 📚. I excel in programming languages such as C#, Java, and Python, and I have experience in both Front-End and Back-End development using JavaScript, JQuery, HTML, CSS, and more ⚙️.
about-me-desc-2: The frameworks I primarily focus on for building software solutions are .NET Framework, .NET Core, and React. I specialize in microservices architectures, cloud solutions, and building secure, scalable and high-performance software.
about-me-desc-3: I currently work at 'IAS Software', a company that provides technology and development solutions for organizations seeking to optimize and streamline their internal processes 🔍. I work as a Full Stack software developer within a specialized team that supports various company projects to ensure efficient, high-quality deliveries, following the DevOps methodology 🛠.
about-me-desc-4: In parallel, I'm pursuing a Specialization in Information Security, strengthening my focus on secure development. I hope you enjoy the content I've prepared; if you need anything, just let me know.
experience-desc: My professional journey in software development.
exp-ias-desc: Full-stack implementation and development under the DevOps methodology, supporting various company projects to achieve efficient, high-quality deliveries.
exp-syc-desc: Building solutions with .NET and React, APIs and microservices, integrations with SQL Server and Oracle, automation and AI/OCR solutions.
exp-intern-desc: First professional steps: supporting the development of web and desktop applications within production teams.
services-desc: Areas where I add value, built on real production experience.
svc-web-desc: Web applications with .NET and React + TypeScript. Includes building a custom captcha designed to detect automated or malicious interactions.
svc-api-desc: Building and consuming APIs in .NET and Node.js, enabling distributed, secure communication between internal and external services.
svc-db-desc: Managing SQL Server and Oracle: scripts, views, functions, stored procedures and query optimization to improve performance.
svc-cloud-desc: Resource management, service consumption and application deployment on AWS and Azure.
svc-ai-desc: Predictive models in Python, ChatGPT integration, and OCR and image-enhancement solutions.
svc-micro-desc: Webservices, automata and desktop applications with modular, scalable architectures for distributed systems.
education-skills-desc: I have knowledge of the following technologies and programming languages, which I commonly use to develop solutions. 🔍
edu-no-support: The certificate will be available upon completion of the program.
edu-secesp-details: Postgraduate program focused on system protection, risk management, cryptography, application security and incident response. Currently in progress, it complements my full-stack profile with a focus on building software that is secure by design.
edu-aws-details: AWS foundational cloud certification that validates overall knowledge of the AWS Cloud, its core services, security, architecture, pricing model, and support. Currently in progress, it reinforces my focus on secure and scalable cloud solutions.
edu-eng-details: This degree represents my undergraduate education as a Systems and Computer Engineer. During this program I gained a solid foundation in software development, system design, and information technology management. The training included subjects such as programming, databases, networks, and operating systems, providing the knowledge necessary to tackle complex technological challenges and develop innovative solutions.
edu-mintic-details: The Misión TIC Certification is a program sponsored by the Colombian national government, in which I participated to enhance my programming skills. It included a series of programming challenges for both web and desktop applications. The experience allowed me to develop advanced skills, solving complex problems and applying modern technologies to create effective solutions.
edu-veracode-details: The VERACODE Certification is a credential in the field of information security, obtained through an online course specialized in protecting against cybersecurity attacks. It equipped me to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities in websites and servers, strengthening the security of applications and IT systems, and implementing practices to safeguard information and prevent threats.
edu-congress-details: The 1st International Engineering Congress: Trends for Sustainable Development was a notable event where best practices and emerging trends in systems and computer engineering were discussed. Participating allowed me to gain a broad perspective on innovations and sustainable approaches in technological development, connecting with professionals and experts in the field.
projects-desc: A selection of projects I'm proud of throughout my career.
projects-private-note: The projects shown here are public. Many others are private or confidential (client or company work) and cannot be displayed; in those cases my work is reflected as a contribution to internal solutions.
project-edesk-desc: Support and management platform for enterprise clients.
project-streamlabs-desc: Web client for streaming remote labs.
project-sycaptcha-desc: Custom captcha to detect automated or malicious interactions.
project-dispensador-desc: Registration and dispensing module for Casa del Libro Total.
project-mercanalyzer-desc: Web scraping for market price analysis and comparison.
project-bingo-desc: Java algorithm for generating bingo cards.
connect-me-desc: Have a project, an opportunity, or just want to say hi? Reach out and let's talk.
